scripts.check: pnpm format:check && turbo run check test
scripts.arch:imports: depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --ts-config $PWD/apps/web/tsconfig.json --output-type err apps modules && depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --ts-config $PWD/packages/ui/tsconfig.json --output-type err packages/ui && depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --output-type err packages/eslint-config packages/testing-kit packages/typescript-config
scripts.arch:check: pnpm arch:manifests && pnpm arch:exports && pnpm arch:workspaces && pnpm arch:cross-context && pnpm arch:imports && pnpm arch:rules:test
scripts.semgrep: mkdir -p /tmp/www-ai-semgrep-home && env -u HTTP_PROXY -u HTTPS_PROXY -u ALL_PROXY HOME=/tmp/www-ai-semgrep-home semgrep scan --config .semgrep/ci.yml --config .semgrep/architecture.yml --exclude '**/.next/**' --exclude '**/.source/**' --error --metrics=off apps modules packages scripts
scripts.ci: pnpm check && pnpm docs:check && pnpm arch:check && pnpm build && pnpm semgrep
